title: New AR Invoice
subtitle: Create a manual or order-based accounts receivable invoice with tenant-safe validation.

manualLines.title: Manual Line Items
manualLines.subtitle: Build the invoice with reusable line items and live totals.

orderBatch.title: Order Selection
orderBatch.subtitle: Issue one AR invoice from multiple eligible orders.
orderBatch.hint: Paste one order UUID per line or separate them with commas.

review.title: Review and Issue
review.subtitle: Validate the source, totals, and schedule before creating the invoice.

validation.title: Resolve these validation items before issuing

errors.title: Unable to create invoice
errors.createFailed: Failed to create the AR invoice.
errors.customerRequired: Customer ID is required for manual AR invoices.
errors.currencyInvalid: Currency code must be a valid 3-letter code.
errors.orderIdsRequired: Provide at least one order ID for order-based issuance.
errors.lineDescriptionRequired: Each manual line must have a description.
errors.quantityInvalid: Each manual line must have a quantity greater than zero.
